# libredash agent ask

Ask the LibreDash read-only agent a question

## Usage

```sh
libredash agent ask [question] [flags]
```

## Options

| Flag | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--conversation` | string | `` | existing agent conversation id |
| `--json` | bool | `false` | print JSON response |
| `--target` | string | `` | LibreDash server URL |
| `--token` | string | `` | API token |

## Inherited options

| Flag | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--workspace` | string | `` | workspace id |
